title: centaurea idaea
intro: Centaurea idaea, also known as the Balkan cornflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant is known to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems. Centaurea idaea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
